title: たくさんの彩りの中で

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from a day out with Satono
Diamond, we stop by the shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There are so many shops in here that it makes my
head spin! But I'll definitely visit them all some
da—oh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Whaddya think of this one? Doesn't it
look mature? Or maybe this?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! Satono incoming! Hey-ho! ☆

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mayano! Hey, Creek! Doing a little
shopping?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. That's right! Creek's picking out some
mature clothes for me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But I can't decide. I just want everything I see! ☆

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm at a bit of a loss too—the problem is
that Maya looks so cute in any outfit she wears.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So that's it! Then perhaps I could help. I'd love to
find the perfect outfit for you, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Satono Diamond helps Mayano Top Gun
shop for clothes.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... This is more difficult than I thought. I
can normally decide on outfits for myself rather
quickly...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I suppose everyone has different standards when
choosing clothes for themselves.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What do you think I should focus on, Trainer?
choice_data_list: An outfit that suits Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. Deciding on a theme for the
outfit is important!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Then, let me go back to the drawing board!
Hehe. What to choose, what to choose. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've decided! What do you think of this outfit,
Mayano?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond assembles an outfit using a
combination of items with subdued colors.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! A white blouse with a navy blue skirt!
It's so chic and mature!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The high-waisted skirt will make my legs look
longer, too. This is sure to boost my allure. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
An outfit like this could totally work for me!
Thanks for opening my eyes to new
possibilities. ☆

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm so glad you like it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But how did you put together such a
mature-looking outfit so easily?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well... I think it's because as a member of the
Satono family, I often have to appear in public.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, most of the guests that attend
our social gatherings are adults.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I tend to opt for elegant color combinations so
that I fit in with everybody else.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! "Social gathering" has such a mature ring
to it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I wonder if one day I'll be able to attend one
as a sophisticated adult.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course you will! We frequently invite
Umamusume who are active in the world of
racing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Then, I've gotta make sure I'm ready for
my high society debut! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Satono, I want you to teach me how to put
together all kinds of mature outfits! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Not a problem! I'll give you all the knowledge you
need!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Look at how exuberant they are. They're
both so adorable. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I see! I suppose it would be pointless if I don't
choose something that suits the wearer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I'll need to think long and hard about
this. Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've decided! What do you think of this outfit,
Mayano?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond creates an outfit using a
combination of cute and vibrant items.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I personally think the ruffles are really cute. Do
you like it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's so lovely! And the bows on the sleeves
are a real nice touch! ☆

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I think so too! You've got a good eye!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The bows don't clash with the cuffs, so I thought
they'd make perfect adornments. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Right, right! And the pants are on the shorter
side, just how I like them. They're so cute! ☆

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And if we were to choose footwear to match...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! Oh, I know! Ankle boots, right?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! Exactly! You really get it, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The pants are short, so I thought that pairing
them with ankle boots would help to make your
legs look longer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm! I totally getcha! Plus, showing off my legs
might boost my allure a little!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I think we've got similar tastes, Satono. ☆ Hey,
let's look around for more outfits together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It would be my pleasure! Let's start over there and
work our way around. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Look at how exuberant they are. They're
both so adorable. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Creek! Would you like to tag along with
us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the four of us enjoy some time shopping
for clothes together.
